hero.title: Jhonatanmizu
hero.subtitle: FullStack Software Engineer
hero.description: Full-Stack Software Engineer with over 4 years of experience designing and building scalable, high-performance systems. Specialized in modern application architecture, with strong expertise in React, React Native, Node.js, NestJS, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, Django, and FastAPI. Experienced in developing custom libraries, code analysis tools, and software quality–driven solutions. Focused on clean engineering practices, user experience, and delivering robust, high-impact products.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Me
about.description1: I'm a versatile FullStack Developer and UI/UX design enthusiast with over 4 years of professional experience crafting digital experiences that bridge the gap between complex engineering and intuitive design.
about.description2: I combine strong engineering principles with product awareness to build scalable, high-performance systems. Using technologies like React, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, and Python, I focus on clean architecture, code quality, and long-term maintainability, ensuring every technical decision supports user needs and business growth.
